metadata.name: abstention
metadata.summary: Functions for abstention, calibration and label shift domain adaptation

functions.name: abstention.figure_making_utils.wilcox_srs
documentation: critical values for test statistics here: https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/nonparametric-statistics-a/9781118840429/bapp02.xhtml

methods.name: abstention.label_shift.AbstractShiftWeightEstimator.__call__
documentation: Should return the ratios of the weights for each class

methods.name: abstention.label_shift.EMImbalanceAdapter.__call__
documentation: valid_labels are only needed if calibration is to be performed

classes.name: abstention.label_shift.ShiftWeightFromImbalanceAdapter
documentation: effectively a wrapper around an ImbalanceAdapter

methods.name: abstention.abstention.AbstainerFactory.__call__
documentation:
Inputs: validation set labels, posterior probs, uncertainties
Returns: a function that accepts posterior probs and
            uncertainties and outputs the abstention scores,
            where a low score = KEEP

classes.name: abstention.abstention.DualThresholdsFromPointFiveOnValidSet
documentation: Fumera, Giorgio, Fabio Roli, and Giorgio Giacinto.
